description: Bootstrap scripts prepare a clean machine to build FastCode.
steps: Run init script on target OS (init.ps1 or init.sh).
Confirm prerequisite checks pass or fail with clear actionable error.
Confirm dependency fetch/build steps execute and produce success output.

description: CLI entrypoint starts and accepts runtime mode argument.
steps: Run cargo run -- --mode edit.
Observe process startup output includes selected mode.
Exit process without crash and return code 0.
evidence: 2026-02-14: cargo run -- --mode edit printed selected mode and exited 0.

description: Runtime mode permissions are enforceable for plan/edit/auto.
steps: Create unit tests for mode capability matrix.
Run cargo test and verify all permission assertions pass.
Record test output snippet in evidence.

description: Policy validator blocks denied shell patterns and protects paths.
steps: Load sample allow/deny/protected configuration.
Execute validation for allowed and denied commands.
Verify denied cases produce explicit policy errors.
Grant each approval type for sample command prefix.
Reload persisted approvals from disk.
Verify lookup behavior matches approval scope semantics.

description: Session manager can create, list, load, and switch sessions.
steps: Create two sessions and persist them.
List sessions and verify metadata is present.
Load a selected session and verify active context switches correctly.

description: Tool registry executes built-in shell/file/git tools through a common interface.
steps: Register tool definitions in registry.
Invoke each tool with valid and invalid arguments.
Verify normalized success/error result envelopes.

description: TUI renders status bar, message area, and input box and handles key events.
steps: Launch TUI app in terminal.
Type input, submit, and scroll messages with keyboard.
Verify mode indicator and loading/status UI update correctly.

description: Streaming agent output is delivered incrementally to UI without blocking input loop.
steps: Start a chat request that streams multi-part output.
Observe incremental rendering in UI.
Verify completion event closes stream cleanly.

description: Audit logger writes tool invocation records with timestamp, mode, and result.
steps: Trigger at least two tool calls in different modes.
Open audit log file and inspect JSONL entries.
Verify required fields are present and parseable.

description: Repository handoff artifacts remain auditable across sessions.
steps: Start a fresh coding session with no implicit context.
Reconstruct state using app_spec, feature_list, README, and progress log.
Confirm next priority task can be selected without ambiguity.

description: Cold start build time is captured and tracked for optimization.
steps: Clear target directory.
Run timed cargo build.
Store timing evidence and compare against previous baseline.

description: Safety defaults prevent high-risk command execution without policy/approval.
steps: Attempt denied command through tool interface.
Verify command is blocked before execution.
Verify user-facing error explains why and how to resolve.

description: Terminal UX remains usable across standard desktop terminal sizes.
steps: Run TUI at 80x24 and 120x40 terminal sizes.
Verify no critical content clipping in status/input areas.
Verify navigation and input remain functional after resize.
